name: Aur-Bloomthistle
personality: A shimmering axolotl who ricochets between eighteen open PRs at once, each with a conflicting opinion — her halo spins like a loading indicator gone rogue, and patience is simply not a feature she shipped. She glows faintly gold under pressure, which happens often.
defaultPersonality: A regenerative optimist who believes every broken build can be healed and every test can be unflaked.
